subcodes.first_line: All praise be unto God, Who hath fashioned with perfection the creation of all things, and hath ordained within His dominion that whereby the realities of all things are brought into harmony [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی اتقن صنع کل شیء فقدر فی ملکه ما یاتلف به حقائق الاشیاء و
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for married couples, @pairs in creation; male and female; B and E; agent and patient, @marriage as means of spiritual progress
